selections.name: Crashed And Burned
selections.reason: Resumes with a strong trial and has performed well fresh previously.

selections.name: Close Call
selections.reason: First-up with a solid trial, capable of making an impact.

selections.name: Blinding Luck
selections.reason: Fitter second-up and draws well to get a good run.

selections.name: Spartan Lass
selections.reason: Former Victorian making WA debut, watch betting.

danger_horse.name: Miss Rompin
danger_horse.reason: Drawn the inside and showed improvement last start.

selections.name: Starchaser
selections.reason: Ran well for third last start on a slow track, ready to peak.

selections.name: Long Reign
selections.reason: Resuming from a break, has shown ability in Victoria.

selections.name: God'll Getya
selections.reason: Set the pace last time and held on for second, will be prominent.

selections.name: Dolce Maschino
selections.reason: First starter drawn the rail, trials have been okay.

danger_horse.name: Peigi
danger_horse.reason: Can improve on debut effort with race experience.

selections.name: Eternally Yours
selections.reason: Narrowly beaten last start, looks primed to go one better.

selections.name: Sea Of Galilee
selections.reason: Made good ground last time, knocking on the door.

selections.name: Gilded Reign
selections.reason: Appreciates the drop back to this track and trip.

selections.name: Belle Of Bondi
selections.reason: Suited out in trip today and can show improvement.

danger_horse.name: Royal Crest
danger_horse.reason: Drawn the inside and gets Jefferson Tsang aboard.

selections.name: Aurora Queen
selections.reason: Flew home to score last start, can repeat the dose here.

selections.name: Diablo Lad
selections.reason: Better effort last start when third, drawn to get a soft run.

selections.name: Bit Tired Actually
selections.reason: Improver coming back in distance, won two starts back.

selections.name: Great Deal
selections.reason: Looks well placed back to the mile today.

danger_horse.name: Win To Retire
danger_horse.reason: Working up to a win and can feature in the finish.

selections.name: Sniper's Son
selections.reason: Fitter now and looks the one to beat in this easier assignment.

selections.name: Wiluna Lass
selections.reason: Better placed here and looks a leading chance on the quick turnaround.

selections.name: Reggio Calabria
selections.reason: Bounced back last start and can be in the finish yet again.

selections.name: Order Online
selections.reason: Expecting him to be in the finish based on previous form.

danger_horse.name: We Love Charlie
danger_horse.reason: Won well last start and can repeat the dose without surprising.

selections.name: Masamune
selections.reason: Got the job done last start and can go on with the job.

selections.name: Head'em
selections.reason: Unbeaten at this track and trip, can get back to winning ways.

selections.name: Storm Commander
selections.reason: Nice effort last time, can be in this for a long way from an inside barrier.

selections.name: Prince
selections.reason: Definite winning chance, can bounce back coming back to a suitable race.

danger_horse.name: Crystalist
danger_horse.reason: Tested again but has ability on his day.

selections.name: Brave Apache
selections.reason: Good win last time out and he can go on with the job.

selections.name: Flying South
selections.reason: Loves this track and trip and the inside barrier has him as a leading chance.

selections.name: Cruise To Rio
selections.reason: Hard to knock her form and she can put her best foot forward again.

selections.name: Niccy's Affair
selections.reason: Likely to be there at the finish again after a solid second.

danger_horse.name: Henry The Aviator
danger_horse.reason: Racing well his past couple and has claims.

selections.name: Cheyne Bay
selections.reason: Building nicely and he makes plenty of appeal over this trip.

selections.name: Audio Boy
selections.reason: Working up to a win. May be able to dictate from the front.

selections.name: Fat Roy Slim
selections.reason: Looks well placed and won't be far away.

selections.name: Deadly And Fast
selections.reason: Is proven at this track and distance and he'll be set to peak here.

danger_horse.name: Argyle Star
danger_horse.reason: Going well. Drawn well but others make more appeal.

selections.name: Gingers Sister
selections.reason: Got the job done in a photo last start and this shapes favourably.

selections.name: Makin Prophets
selections.reason: Better than he showed last start and he can bounce back to form.

selections.name: Where's My Lunch
selections.reason: Just missed last time out and can go one better.

selections.name: Sky God
selections.reason: Well placed to play a major role.

danger_horse.name: Fight In Flight
danger_horse.reason: Goes well at this track and trip and she can get back to her best.
